Singing Steel Breastplate  
 

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 40
STR: +10 DEX: +10 CHA: +10 AGI: +10
Effect: Invigorate (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 45
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: BRD
Race: HUM ELF HEF VAH DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Singing Steel Breastplate
Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 40
STR: +10 DEX: +10 CHA: +10 AGI: +10
Effect: Invigorate (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 45
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: BRD
Race: HUM ELF HEF VAH DRK

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Appearance:Plate
Tint:

Stackable:No

Tribute:15000

Page Updated:Tue Apr 23rd, 2024

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 29,999pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55

Singing Steel bp
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2004 at 11:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258988162
304 posts
I got this bp for lvl 45, i sold Lots of MQ jboots to afford it, i even traded in the bazaar <shock horror> and at the end of the day, it saved my butt, numerous tims, i readily traded it in for a Undead Trak guts to get my epic, and i must say the trade in was a damn good trade if your in a low lvl guild. Anyway ive been using an ikky bp ever since, and have had a few opportunities to buy one since, but i just seem to keep saving for ornate stuff



Diplomat (55) Bard

Funny
QuoteReply
# May 29 2003 at 6:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1618186913975
View User Forum
19 posts
Very sad but in a way funny story I have with my ss breastplate. I usually keep it in a bag or slot to switch over for a good heal when I need it. Well was sellin off junk to vendor one day just going thru my bags sellin the crap and wouldnt you know it. Sold my ss bp to the vendor. All I felt was rage and banged my head. After a few minutes of sobbing I spent a pretty penny buyin it back from vendor whom I killed in rage after wards.

Ignorance can be funny at time

QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2003 at 1:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
There's no minimum level to wear this (and get the stats from this), but you can't use the right-click effect of invigorate until level 45.
▲ Page top
Love the Effect!
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 1:45 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592253216365
4 posts
I am a 55th Bard on Fennin Ro. I love the effect on this BP. As of this date this is what the effect does. Its a 100 hp heal in 6 seconds self-only. And on top of all that, like all clickable bard armor, you can cast it while moving. Being self-only you dont have to target yourself in battle to cast it just keep slashing.

Phonic Dissonance
55th Bard
Fennin Ro

▲ Page top
The skinny on Invigorate
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2002 at 1:08 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592250011860
12 posts
I was delighted to be able to be a part of a Trakanon raid and get this amazing item this afternoon.

I wanted to share the info in Invigorate as some of the other posts are incorrect.

Invigorate is a 90 hp self only heal and takes 6 seconds to cast.

Good luck to all of you!

Papageno Zauberflote
52 Minstrel
Prexus Server

Edited, Mon Mar 4 01:08:19 2002
▲ Page top
Drop rate....
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2001 at 3:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251096374
5 posts
Actually, I've been told by good sources that this BP drops more frequently off of Trak than some of the other class-only BP's off of him. So, for those who said that it is a very rare drop off of Trak....yes, it is rare, but not quite as rare as some of the others. Overall, though, a great BP...would love to have it.

Divaa Liscious
Bard of the 30th Song
Proud Follower of Veeshan
Quellious

QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2003 at 1:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Well price has dropped a bit since PoP, but this still sells for 40 to 50k usually. Figure it out, it's a rare drop from a very difficult mob (Trakanon). Effect is very useful and stats are excellent. You pretty much need BD cultural or PoP smithed items to outdo the stats, and you still wouldn't have the effect.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 16 2001 at 1:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) lets see, this is slightly better than my banded BP, itd be a toss-up wether to use this or banded any suggestions on which to use innn which situations?
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 18 2001 at 12:32 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Your kidding right? Slightly better? If you are not kidding you should be burned, sent to the sun, combusted, brought back to earth, then burned again. This is so much better than Banded. I would trade 100 banded tunics for this without hesitation. This thing drops off a dragon and banded ca nbe crafted off a lvl 19 full skill black smith. It has a bout 1/3 the ac, no buffs, and no proc. If you had to choose between this and Banded, i would consider you insane to use banded.
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 02 2001 at 5:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) dude first of all ur a Moron he was just joking around, you dont have to flame him, he knows it 1 million times better than banded, jeez, lighten up

__DEL__1591766507531
36 posts
That's cause bronze looks better and everyone knows that the better a bard looks the better his songs are...

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 11 2001 at 9:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) All singing steel armor is triggered and isn't proc'd What this means is you click on it with your right button.. Or have it hot keyed.. Invigorate is a 100 hp heal. Invigor is 15% stamina heal. I have this bp and it's worth tons, I was won in a roll orginally but bought it off my clan leader for 55. This has infinite clicks of heal. recast time is about 10 seconds. At 54 from about 300 hp I have to click this about 13 times to get back to full. Great item
